author: rosswang
description: 边对比 / 流程图 / 幻灯片 / 报告 / 时间线 — 在 Obsidian 中直接渲染空间化 HTML 内容。基于 html-effectiveness 方法论。 - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: rosswang
manifest.description: Render spatial HTML in notes — compare, timeline, diagram, report, slides. Export as standalone HTML with zoom controls. Based on html-effectiveness methodology.
manifest.name: HTML Effectiveness

name: HTML Effectiveness

releases.author: yanqingwang
releases.description: Complete upgrade matching html-effectiveness skill methodology.
releases.name: v1.0.19 — Full html-effectiveness skill implementation

releases.author: yanqingwang
releases.description:
## 🔧 Fixes

Resolved all warnings from the Obsidian automated review scan:

- **no-unsafe-assignment**: `parseYaml()` and `loadData()` return values now properly typed
- **no-unsafe-call / no-unsafe-member-access**: Regex callback params explicitly typed
- **unnecessary assertion**: Removed redundant `as string` and `as HEHTMLView` casts (instanceof already narrows)
- **unnecessary escape**: Removed \\/ escape in template literal
- **activeDocument**: Use `container.ownerDocument` instead of global `document`
- **builtin-modules**: Pre-existing dev dependency warning (non-blocking)

### Zoom feature from v1.0.17 unchanged:
- Ctrl+wheel / Ctrl+=/-/0 zoom in HTML viewer
- Floating zoom bar with +/−/reset
- localStorage persistence
- Auto-skip for files with existing zoom controls
releases.name: v1.0.18 — Fix lint warnings flagged by Obsidian review

releases.author: yanqingwang
releases.description:
## ✨ What's New

### Zoom Controls in HTML Viewer
When opening .html files in Obsidian, you can now zoom in/out:

- **Zoom bar**: floating bottom-right bar with +/−/reset buttons (auto-hides until hover)
- **Ctrl+wheel**: scroll to zoom
- **Ctrl+= / Ctrl+- / Ctrl+0**: keyboard shortcuts
- **Persistence**: zoom level saved to localStorage, remembers across sessions
- **Auto-skip**: files already containing zoom controls (e.g. html-effectiveness generated) are left untouched

### Fixes
- Fixed TypeScript error: `isDead()` removed in favor of null check on leaf.view
releases.name: v1.0.17 — Zoom controls in HTML viewer

releases.author: yanqingwang
releases.description:
## v1.0.16

- Replace base tag approach with getResourcePath for image URL resolution
- Relative image paths in HTML files are converted to Obsidian resource URLs
releases.name: v1.0.16

releases.author: yanqingwang
releases.description:
## v1.0.15

- Add base tag to srcdoc for relative image path resolution
- Images in HTML files now load correctly
releases.name: v1.0.15

releases.author: yanqingwang
releases.description:
## v1.0.14

- Fix iframe sandbox to include allow-scripts for interactive HTML content
releases.name: v1.0.14

releases.author: yanqingwang
releases.description:
## v1.0.11

- Fix: HEHTMLView now loads file from leaf view state (not getActiveFile)
- Fix: Add vault modify listener to refresh iframe when HTML file changes
- Fix: Add workspace file-open handler for proper view loading
- Fix: Clean up view references on layout change
- All fixes from previous versions included
releases.name: v1.0.11

releases.author: yanqingwang
releases.description:
## v1.0.8

- Pure DOM API throughout: no innerHTML, insertAdjacentHTML, or createContextualFragment
- All template rendering uses createEl/createDiv/createSpan with textContent
- Settings heading uses 'Display' instead of 'Settings'
- All fixes from previous versions included
releases.name: v1.0.8
